scripts.build: rm -rf public/legacy public-legacy && GITHUB_PAGES=1 vite --config vite.legacy.config.js build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
scripts.build:cloudflare: rm -rf public/legacy public-legacy && mkdir -p public-legacy && cp -R public/assets public-legacy/assets && vite --config vite.legacy.config.js build && rm -rf public-legacy && vinext build && node scripts/dedupe-client-public-assets.mjs && mkdir -p dist/.openai && cp .openai/hosting.json dist/.openai/hosting.json
